title: POST /books persistence broken — books table never created (diesel migration mis-structured)
evidence: migrations/00000000000001_diesel_initial_setup.up.sql is a FLAT file, not a migrations/<ver>_<name>/up.sql subdirectory; diesel 2.x embed_migrations! (src/db.rs:6) applies 0 migrations, so create_book (src/handlers.rs:59) inserts into a non-existent 'books' table at runtime. _agent_stdout.log:1 'the books table is not being created'; test_create_and_list_books (src/main.rs:94) fails; scores.json test_coverage=0.8 (4/5).
suggestion: Move the migration into migrations/00000000000001_diesel_initial_setup/{up,down}.sql so embed_migrations! picks it up, or create the table explicitly before serving/tests.

title: test_create_and_list_books fails (1 of 5 tests)
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.8 (rust pass-rate fallback = 4/5). Failing test src/main.rs:94 calls run_migrations() then create_book(); the create step hits a missing 'books' table because migrations apply nothing (see R1).
suggestion: Fix the migration structure (R1); the test itself is correctly written and will pass once the table is created.

title: Repair run terminated before fixing the migration
evidence: .hermes_usage.json completed:false, api_calls:90; _agent_stdout.log ends mid-pivot ('Let me try a simpler approach - directly create the table in the test') — the agent ran out before landing the fix.
suggestion: Re-run with more headroom, or seed the DB schema outside diesel migrations.

title: R12 is MET (correcting prior evaluation)
evidence: Pinned REQUIREMENTS.json R12 = 'At least 3 unit/integration tests' (verify: >=3 tests exist and run, test_coverage>0). 5 tests present (src/main.rs:39,82,88,94,136); test_coverage=0.8>0. Prior evaluator mis-mapped the repair banner goal 'all tests pass' onto R12.
